latin: Pater filium parvum, qui in puteum ceciderat, extraxit et dixit: 'cur cadimus? ut resurgere discamus.'

questions.prompt: Why do we fall, according to the father?
questions.target: So that we can learn to rise again
choices: So that we can learn to rise again

translation: The father pulled his small son, who had fallen into a pit, out and said: 'Why do we fall? So that we can learn to rise again.'
